9:"$Sreact.suspense"
:HL["/_next/static/chunks/e20b3f65e97ac4be.css","style"]
4:T928,
# 构建可访问的 Web 应用

Web 可访问性确保所有用户都能使用你的应用，包括残障用户。

## 为什么需要可访问性？

- **法律要求**：许多国家有 WCAG 合规要求
- **用户体验**：改善每个人体验
- **SEO 优化**：搜索引擎更好地理解你的内容

## 语义化 HTML

使用正确的 HTML 元素：

```tsx
// ❌ 错误
<div onClick={handleClick}>Click me</div>

// ✅ 正确
<button onClick={handleClick}>Click me</button>
```

### 常用语义元素

| 元素 | 用途 |
|------|------|
| `<header>` | 页面或区域的头部 |
| `<nav>` | 导航链接 |
| `<main>` | 主要内容 |
| `<article>` | 独立内容 |
| `<aside>` | 侧边栏 |
| `<footer>` | 页面或区域的底部 |

## ARIA 属性

当 HTML 不足时使用 ARIA：

```tsx
// 隐藏装饰性元素
<div aria-hidden="true">
  <Icon />
</div>

// 输入提示
<label htmlFor="email">Email</label>
<input 
  id="email" 
  type="email" 
  aria-describedby="email-hint" 
/>
<p id="email-hint">We'll never share your email.</p>

// 加载状态
<button aria-busy={isLoading}>
  {isLoading ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}
</button>
```

## 键盘导航

确保所有交互可通过键盘操作：

```tsx
// ❌ 使用 div 点击
<div onClick={openMenu}>Menu</div>

// ✅ 使用按钮
<button onClick={openMenu}>Menu</button>

// 焦点管理
function Modal({ isOpen, onClose }) {
  const dialogRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      dialogRef.current?.focus()
    }
  }, [isOpen])
  
  return (
    <div 
      role="dialog"
      ref={dialogRef}
      tabIndex={-1}
    >
      <button onClick={onClose}>Close</button>
    </div>
  )
}
```

## 颜色对比度

确保文本有足够的对比度：

```css
/* ✅ 符合 WCAG AA */
.text-primary {
  color: #1a1a1a; /* 对比度 16:1 */
}

/* ❌ 不符合 */
.text-low-contrast {
  color: #767676; /* 对比度 4.5:1，不达标 */
}
```

使用工具检查：
- [WebAIM Contrast Checker](https://webaim.org/resources/contrastchecker/)
- Chrome 开发者工具

## 屏幕阅读器测试

常用屏幕阅读器：
- **macOS**: VoiceOver (⌘ + F5)
- **Windows**: NVDA、JAWS
- **iOS**: VoiceOver
- **Android**: TalkBack

## 总结

可访问性不是负担，而是高质量 Web 应用的标志。从小事做起，逐步改善。0:{"buildId":"XwJCTp3VRIq2nXyef8epa","rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"max-w-4xl mx-auto","children":[["$","header",null,{"className":"mb-8","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight mb-4","children":"构建可访问的 Web 应用"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-4 text-muted-foreground mb-4","children":["$","time",null,{"dateTime":"2026-03-11","children":"2026-03-11"}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap gap-2","children":[["$","$L2","Accessibility",{"href":"/tags/Accessibility","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 cursor-pointer","children":"Accessibility"}]}],["$","$L2","Web Development",{"href":"/tags/Web%20Development","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 cursor-pointer","children":"Web Development"}]}],["$","$L2","UX",{"href":"/tags/UX","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 cursor-pointer","children":"UX"}]}]]}]]}],["$","$L3",null,{"source":"$4"}],["$","footer",null,{"className":"mt-12 pt-8 border-t","children":["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/","className":"text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary","children":"← 返回首页"}]}]]}],["$L5","$L6"],"$L7"]}],"loading":null,"isPartial":false}
